title: skill_loaded fires once per Config.skills entry, after agent_started, before any model turn
description: SPEC.md §9.3 normative loop: 'emit skill_loaded for each loaded skill' between agent_started and the first model_turn_started. Pins (a) the count is exactly len(Config.skills), (b) ordering is preserved, (c) every event carries the skill name and source. Custom skill loaders that fail to fetch a SKILL.md MUST still emit skill_loaded for trajectory completeness (per Skill.source description in the schema).
